hero.sub: The free booking system that pays you before your guests arrive. No commission. Full guest data. Yours forever.

problem.heading: The system is not working for you.
problem.sub: Every booking costs you money. Every no-show costs you more. And your own guests do not even belong to you.
problem.card1Title: You pay commission on every single booking.
problem.card1Body: Existing commission-based platforms charge you per cover — even for loyal regulars who have loved your restaurant for years. The more successful you are, the more you pay.
problem.card2Body: No-shows cost Dutch restaurants hundreds of euros every service. You staffed for them. You prepped for them. They simply did not come — and you bear all the loss.
problem.card3Title: Your guest data belongs to someone else.
problem.card3Body: Phone numbers, emails, visit history — kept by the platform. You cannot reach your own customers. Every time they book again, you pay again. Your regulars cost you forever.

solution.heading: Free booking system. Real discounts for guests. Zero commission for you.
solution.sub: Everything you need to welcome guests and get paid — without anyone in between.
solution.card1Body: Beautiful, branded, live in 5 minutes. Widget for your site, link for Instagram, QR for your window. Every booking goes directly to you — nobody in between.
solution.card2Title: Diners pay upfront. You get paid first.
solution.card2Body: Guests choose how much they plan to spend and pay via iDEAL before arrival. They get an instant discount. You get guaranteed cash before service starts. No-shows become structurally impossible.
solution.card3Body: Name, phone, email — stored in your dashboard. Export anytime. Market to them directly. Build the direct relationship that commission platforms have been preventing.

howItWorks.heading: Live in three steps.
howItWorks.sub: No technical knowledge needed. No installation. No contract.
howItWorks.step1Body: Add your restaurant photo, set your opening hours and available time slots. Takes 5 minutes. No technical knowledge needed at all.
howItWorks.step2Body: Add the widget to your website, drop the link in your Instagram bio, add it to your Google Business profile. Print the QR code and put it in your window.
howItWorks.step3Title: Guests book and you get paid
howItWorks.step3Body: Diners book, pay upfront via iDEAL, and receive an instant discount. The money arrives in your account before they walk through the door.

proof.heading: Built on real data.
proof.sub: No assumptions. No marketing numbers. Our own research into Dutch restaurants.
proof.foundingBody: The first 500 restaurants that join The Tafel get the first months completely free. No credit card. No contract. After the trial period, a flat monthly fee applies — no commission ever.

comingSoon.heading: We are just getting started.
comingSoon.sub: The Tafel is building towards the most complete restaurant platform in the Netherlands. Here is a glimpse of what is coming.
comingSoon.card1Body: Diners pay upfront and get an instant discount. You get guaranteed cash before they arrive. Zero no-shows — structurally impossible.
comingSoon.card2Body: Accept prepaid takeaway orders directly. No delivery platform commission. Your customer, your margin, your relationship.
comingSoon.card3Body: Diners discover and book your restaurant through The Tafel's own marketplace. More visibility. Still zero commission.
comingSoon.card4Body: An AI agent that handles incoming booking calls in Dutch — 24 hours a day. Never miss a reservation again.

finalCta.sub: Join restaurants already using The Tafel. Free during your trial period. No credit card. No contract.
finalCta.whatsapp: Questions? WhatsApp us directly — we respond within 4 hours.

verifyEmail.heading: Check your email
verifyEmail.sub: We sent an activation link to
verifyEmail.instructions: Click the link in the email to activate your account. The link is valid for 1 hour.
verifyEmail.spam: No email received? Check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.errorExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one.
verifyEmail.errorUsed: This link has already been used. Request a new one.
verifyEmail.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

setPassword.heading: Set your password.
setPassword.sub: Choose a password of at least 8 characters. You will use this to sign in to your dashboard and the mobile app.
setPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.errorUnauthorized: Session expired. Click your activation link again.
setPassword.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.heading: Sign in.
login.sub: Sign in to your Tafel dashboard.
login.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
login.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.sub: Enter your email address. We will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentSub: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link within 1 minute. The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgotPassword.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

phase1.heading: Find your business.
phase1.sub: Enter your KVK number or business name. We will pull your details from the Dutch Chamber of Commerce register.
phase1.hintIdle: Enter your KVK number or full business name.
phase1.hintTypeMore: Type at least 3 characters to search.
phase1.hintNoResults: No businesses found. Try a full word or the KVK number.

phase2.heading: Check your details.
phase2.sub: We found your business in the KVK register. Does everything look right?
phase2.kvkAlreadyLinked: This KVK number is already linked to another account.

form.displayNameHint: This is how your restaurant will appear to guests.

errors.hydrate: We couldn't load your earlier data. Please refresh the page.
errors.profileFetch: We couldn't fetch the business details. Please try again.
errors.websiteInvalid: Invalid website URL. Use e.g. https://www.restaurant.com.
errors.cuisineRequired: Please choose a cuisine type to continue.

hours.heading: Opening hours
hours.sub: Set when you're open. This applies to all your services.
hours.perServiceHint: Set separate opening hours per service (reservations, takeaway, QR).

errors.hydrate: We couldn't load your data. Please refresh the page.
errors.needOneDay: Enable at least one day to continue.
errors.closeEqualsOpen: Closing time must differ from opening time.

rules.heading: Booking rules
rules.sub: Set the rules the booking engine enforces for you.
rules.leadTimeHint: How far in advance guests can still book.
rules.windowHint: How far ahead guests can book.
rules.maxGuestsHint: Optional cap on total guests in any single slot.
rules.waitlistDescription: When all tables are full, guests can join the waitlist.
rules.zonePreferenceDescription: Guests see available zones (e.g. terrace or indoors) and can express a preference.

noShows.heading: No more no-shows
noShows.sub: Pick which protections your booking engine runs. Everything is optional — you can change this any time later.
noShows.costNote: Reminders are free on all plans. WhatsApp reminders require Premium and use your monthly WhatsApp allowance — overage is € 0.05 per message.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Automatic message 24 hours and 2 hours before the booking.

reconfirmation.title: Reconfirmation
reconfirmation.description: Guest confirms 24 hours before via a link. No confirmation? Booking lapses.

prepaid.title: Prepaid deposit
prepaid.description: Guest pays a deposit at booking. Refunded on attendance, kept on no-show.
prepaid.depositDisclosureNote: Deposits will start charging guests once Mollie verifies your business — usually 2–5 business days after connecting. Until then your setting is saved but no deposits are taken.

ccGuarantee.title: Credit-card guarantee
ccGuarantee.description: Guest provides credit-card details; you charge only on no-show.

aiPredictor.title: AI no-show predictor
aiPredictor.description: Models predict which bookings are at risk of being a no-show.

guests.heading: Guest experience
guests.sub: Set the confirmation message guests receive and the information you collect at booking.
guests.templateSub: This message goes out to every guest after a confirmed booking.
guests.variablesHint: Click a variable to insert it at the cursor.
guests.previewEmpty: Start typing to see your preview.
guests.questionsSub: What do you want to collect from guests at booking?
guests.questionAllergiesDescription: Guest indicates allergies or dietary requirements.
guests.questionOccasionDescription: Birthday, anniversary, or other reason for the visit.
guests.questionRequestsDescription: Free text for requests like table preference or accessibility.

ordering.heading: Online ordering settings
ordering.sub: Set how guests order online for takeaway.
ordering.prepTimeHint: How long the kitchen needs from order to ready.
ordering.minOrderHint: Leave at 0 to require no minimum.
ordering.slotIntervalHint: How often a new pickup slot becomes available.
ordering.acceptingDescription: Switch off to pause takeaway temporarily — for example during a rush.
ordering.itemNotesDescription: Guests can add notes per item, like 'no onions'.
ordering.scheduledDescription: Guests can choose a pickup time later in the day or in the future.

menu.heading: Menu
menu.sub: Give us the basics — we'll turn them into a polished menu within 2 working days. You can also upload later.

sameMenu.heading: One menu or two?
sameMenu.sub: Decide whether you want the same menu for takeaway and QR ordering.
sameMenu.label: One menu for Takeaway and QR
sameMenu.description: Most restaurants save work by using the same menu for both. Switch off if you want separate menus for takeaway and QR ordering.

menuFiles.heading: Upload menu
menuFiles.sub: Send us your existing menu in PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP. Our designers turn it into a brand-aligned version.
menuFiles.dropLabel: Drag files here or click to choose
menuFiles.acceptText: PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP — max 20 MB per file, up to 5 files.
menuFiles.placeholderSingle: The upload field is added in the next build.
menuFiles.placeholderTakeaway: Takeaway menu: the upload field is added in the next build.
menuFiles.placeholderQr: QR menu: the upload field is added in the next build.

cuisine.heading: Tell us about your food
cuisine.sub: A few sentences help our design team capture the right atmosphere.
cuisine.label: What should the menu feel like?
cuisine.hint: Short description of your food and atmosphere — Italian-rustic, Japanese-minimal, etc. Helps our design team.
cuisine.placeholder: e.g. Italian rustic with a focus on pasta and wine…

photos.heading: Photos (optional)
photos.sub: Your own photos of interior or food. Optional — not required.
photos.dropLabel: Drag photos here or click to choose
photos.acceptText: JPG, PNG, or WebP — max 20 MB per file, up to 10 photos.
photos.placeholder: The upload field is added in the next build.

design.heading: Design preferences (optional)
design.sub: Specific wishes for colours, fonts, or example menus you like.
design.label: Specific design wishes
design.hint: Colours, fonts, examples of menus you like — anything that helps us design in your style.
design.placeholder: e.g. dark colours, classic serif font…

menu.uploadErrorNoRestaurant: Restaurant not found. Refresh the page.

qrSetup.heading: QR setup & plan
qrSetup.sub: Choose how QR ordering at the table works and which plan suits you.
qrSetup.plansSub: One-time setup fee. Your monthly subscription is chosen in step 12.

autoAccept.heading: Accepting orders
autoAccept.label: Auto-accept QR orders
autoAccept.description: On: orders go straight to the kitchen. Off: staff must approve each order manually.

itemNotes.heading: Item notes
itemNotes.label: Allow item notes
itemNotes.description: Guests can add notes per item, like 'no onions'.

language.heading: Menu language
language.sub: The languages guests see when they open the QR menu.
language.label: Languages shown on the QR menu

accentColor.heading: Accent colour
accentColor.sub: Colour of the 'Order' button on the QR menu. Default is The Tafel amber.
accentColor.label: Accent colour
accentColor.errorInvalid: Enter a valid hex colour, e.g. #d4820a.

qrCodes.heading: QR codes per table
qrCodes.sub: For each table, choose whether it gets a QR code. The actual code generation lands in the next build.
qrCodes.toggleError: Updating the table failed. Please try again.
qrCodes.generateError: Generating QR codes failed. Please try again.
qrCodes.emptyStateBody: Tables are created in step 3 (Floor plan). If you don't use Reservations, please reach out — we'll help you get set up.

payments.heading: Connect payments
payments.sub: We use Mollie to process payments. Connect your Mollie account so you can receive payouts from takeaway orders and prepaid bookings.

notConnected.title: Connect Mollie
notConnected.body: You'll be sent to Mollie to fill in your business details. You'll be returned to this page when done.

startedNotFinished.title: You haven't finished connecting yet
startedNotFinished.body: It looks like you started the Mollie flow but didn't complete it. Click below to continue.

pendingKyc.title: Connected — verification in progress
pendingKyc.body: Mollie is reviewing your details. This usually takes less than an hour. You can move on to the next step while you wait.

verified.title: Verified
verified.body: You're ready to receive payouts from Mollie.

needsAttention.title: Action needed
needsAttention.body: Mollie needs more information or couldn't verify your details. Click below to go through the connection again.

cta.connectFailed: Couldn't connect to Mollie. Please try again.

info.title: What we share with Mollie
info.bullet1: Your KVK details and business address for Mollie's verification.
info.bullet2: No customer data — Mollie only sees the payment information needed for each transaction.
info.bullet3: Your IBAN and bank details stay with Mollie — we never store them.

paymentsConnected.depositNudge: Prepaid deposits are now available on the no-show protection step. You can configure them now to charge guests a refundable deposit at booking, or skip and add later from the dashboard.

reasons.missing_params: Something went wrong with the Mollie redirect. Please try connecting again.
reasons.state_mismatch: Security check failed — please start the connection over.
reasons.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in and try again.
reasons.restaurant_not_found: Restaurant not found. Contact support if this persists.
reasons.token_exchange_failed: Couldn't complete the Mollie connection. Try again in a moment.
reasons.organization_fetch_failed: Connected to Mollie but couldn't read your organization. Try again.
reasons.persist_failed: Connected to Mollie but couldn't save the connection locally. Contact support.
reasons.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

subscription.title: Choose your plan
subscription.description: Pick the plan that fits you. You're not charged until day 85 — the first 84 days are free.
subscription.trialInfo: 84-day free trial — then {monthly} per month from day 85.

qrPlanPicker.label: QR plan

premium.name: QR Premium
premium.description: 20 QR codes included, custom-designed in your brand style

qrPlanPicker.downgradeNotice: Your QR plan has been reset to QR Basic — QR Premium is only available with a Premium subscription.

subscription.vatNotice: Tariffs for businesses — VAT is deductible via your VAT return.

oneTimeFees.heading: One-time costs
oneTimeFees.extraTables: {count, plural, one {# extra QR table beyond 20 included} other {# extra QR tables beyond 20 included}}
oneTimeFees.noFees: No one-time costs — you haven't selected a QR plan.

errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again and retry.
errors.restaurant_not_found: Restaurant details not found. Please contact support.
errors.step_out_of_order: Earlier steps haven't been completed yet.
errors.checkout_failed: We couldn't prepare the payment. Please try again in a minute.
errors.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.

confirming.title: Confirming your payment
confirming.subtitle: Mollie is processing this. It usually takes a few seconds.

success.title: Payment confirmed
success.subtitle: Taking you to the next step.

failed.title: Payment didn't go through
failed.subtitle: Pick your plan again, or contact support.

timeout.title: Still processing
timeout.subtitle: Mollie hasn't confirmed yet. Try refreshing in a minute.

floorPlan.heading: Floor plan
floorPlan.sub: Add zones and tables for table reservations.

errors.hydrate: We couldn't load your data. Please refresh the page.
errors.zoneNameRequired: Please enter a name for the zone.
errors.zoneNameDuplicate: A zone with that name already exists.
errors.zoneSaveFailed: The zone couldn't be saved. Please try again.

services.heading: Which services would you like to set up?
services.sub: Pick one or combine all three. You can always add more later.
services.hintBanner: Set up all three services — recommended. Restaurants that use all services see the highest combined revenue.
services.errorSave: We couldn't save that. Please try again.
services.errorAdvance: We couldn't move you to the next step. Please try again.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.description: Online reservations, floor plan, opening hours, and no-show protection.

takeaway.title: Takeaway
takeaway.description: Online takeaway orders with instant payment via iDEAL or card.

qr.title: QR ordering
qr.description: Guests order directly from their table by scanning a QR code on their phone.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: Own-delivery flow with connected courier partners.

contract.heading: Order form & signing
contract.subheading: Review the order form below, confirm you accept our terms, and sign.
contract.signaturePlaceholder: Use your mouse or finger to draw
contract.authorityLabel: I confirm I am authorised to sign on behalf of {restaurantName}.
contract.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contract.errorContractChanged: The contract changed since you loaded this page. Refresh to see the latest version.

review.heading: Review and submit for go-live
review.sub: Here is a summary of what you have set up. If it all looks right, submit and our team will take it from here.

modal.heading: Your restaurant on The Tafel.
modal.sub: No credit card. No contract. You will receive an activation link by email instantly.
modal.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
modal.errorEmailExists: This email address is already registered.
modal.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.
modal.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
modal.disclaimer: No commission. No hidden costs. Free during the trial period.
